title: Add retry exhaustion records for failed live runtime actions
summary: Move selected dry-run paths toward guarded live execution with explicit approvals, budgets, retries, audits, and rollback evidence.
acceptanceCriteria: Live execution is opt-in and blocked by policy when risk is high.
Runtime decisions produce audit records with cost, retry, and approval context.
Failure paths degrade to structured reports without corrupting source-of-truth state.
source: Hermes OS extension roadmap generated from phases 48-54
reviewNotes: Implemented through Hermes OS project runtime extension contracts: installed command audits and workspace routing, guarded live-runtime plans, restore plans with conflicts and approvals, runtime dashboard modules, SQLite-backed runtime persistence projections, external template pack lifecycle helpers, continuous workspace health checks, dashboard UI rendering, and integration coverage.
